data.description:
## Why
Code review (M6) flagged `editor.py` (~776 LOC, newly allowlisted) mixing concerns:
host-page rendering, HTTP endpoints, node-config validation, help data, and contract
views.

## What / Scope
Split `editor.py` along its call-graph seams (e.g. extract the node-config
validation + help + contract-view helpers, or the HTTP handler) into a focused module
so each unit is cohesive and the file drops back under the soft cap; remove its
module-size allowlist entry if it falls under 800.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] editor.py is split along an existing seam into cohesive module(s) (no <100 LOC files).
- [ ] If editor.py drops under 800 LOC, its allowlist entry + architecture.md row are removed.
- [ ] Editor + endpoint tests stay green; no behavior change.
data.title: Split editor.py concerns (host/endpoints/validation/contracts)
